heading: Territorial application
label: 1006b Territorial application
text: The provisions of this chapter shall be applicable to Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico, and the Virgin Islands.
notes: Extension of Benefits to Projects Authorized BeforeAug. 7, 1956Section as applicable to all works of improvement and plans for such works under the provisions of this chapter, see Extension of Benefits note set out under .section 1001 of this title
